## Type of change
- [ ] New question(s)
- [ ] New resource(s)
- [ ] New / improved worked answer
- [ ] Correction (dead link, stale price, changed loop, outdated framework)
- [ ] Content / structure improvement

## Quality checklist
- [ ] **Provenance labeled** — real questions marked ✅ Reported (with source URL) or 🔮 Representative
- [ ] **Per-option whys** — every multiple-choice option has a reason, including the wrong ones; correct option marked ✅
- [ ] **Links typed + annotated** — no bare dumps; a type emoji + a one-sentence annotation each; capped ~8 per topic
- [ ] **Repos license-noted** — stars + license included
- [ ] **License discipline** — no verbatim copying of CC-BY-SA / non-permissive content; MIT/Apache/CC0 attributed
- [ ] **Voice** — sharp, senior, concrete, answer-first; dated 2026 where relevant
- [ ] **Links pass** — the lychee link-check workflow is green (or I've fixed what it flagged)
